age_range.evidence: The aim of this qualitative study is to gain insight into how girls and young women aged 13–19 give meaning to facial-beauty content on social media.

countries.evidence: The interviews were conducted in the Spring of 2024 in the Netherlands.

fieldwork_year.evidence: The interviews were conducted in the Spring of 2024 in the Netherlands.

gender_split.evidence: The interviews with 16 adolescent female respondents (ages 13–19; for details, see Table 1).

sample_size.evidence: Based on the 16 interviews, it can be concluded that facial-beauty content on social media plays a significant role in the lives of girls and young women...
